title: gonystylus maingayi
intro: Gonystylus maingayi, also known as the Peninsular Gonystylus, is a species of tree in the family Thymelaeaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark and leaves, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The bark of Gonystylus maingayi has been used to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, while its leaves have been used to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory problems. Gonystylus maingayi can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health issues.
